docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LOVE, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, AURORA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 60.00 SERVED SEP-22-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, AURORA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. CASE SETTLED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
